[textmode.js](../../../../../index.md) / [media](../../../index.md) / [TextmodeVideo](../../TextmodeVideo.md) / volume

# Method: volume()

```ts
volume(level): this;
```

Set playback volume.

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| ------ | ------ | ------ |
| `level` | `number` | Volume level from `0` to `1`. Videos loaded through [Textmodifier.loadVideo](../../../../../classes/Textmodifier/methods/loadVideo.md) start muted to satisfy autoplay rules. Unmute the underlying [videoElement](../accessors/videoElement.md) in response to a user gesture before expecting audible volume changes. |

## Returns

`this`
